tools.name: whoami
tools.title: Who am I
tools.description: Returns the signed-in Hotel Excella user's id, email, and roles. Use to verify the MCP connection is authenticated as the expected user.

tools.name: list_bookings
tools.title: List bookings
tools.description: List Hotel Excella bookings visible to the signed-in user. Supports optional filters: status, arriving-on date (YYYY-MM-DD), and a text search over guest name or booking reference. Returns up to 50 most-recent bookings.

arriving_on.description: Optional check-in date filter in YYYY-MM-DD.

search.description: Optional text to match against guest name or booking reference.

limit.description: Max rows to return (default 25, hard capped at 50).
